title: elcismia lyallii
intro: Elcismia lyallii, also known as the Kowhai, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant contains flavonoids, particularly the isoflavone, formononetin, which has been shown to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elcismia lyallii include its potential to support heart health, reduce menopausal symptoms, and act as an antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural defenses.
